documentation.text:
@dev Contract module which provides a basic access control mechanism, where
 there is an account (an owner) that can be granted exclusive access to
 specific functions.
 The initial owner is set to the address provided by the deployer. This can
 later be changed with {transferOwnership}.
 This module is used through inheritance. It will make available the modifier
 `onlyOwner`, which can be applied to your functions to restrict their use to
 the owner.
@dev The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.
@dev The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)
@dev Initializes the contract setting the address provided by the deployer as the initial owner.
@dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.
@dev Returns the address of the current owner.
@dev Throws if the sender is not the owner.

@dev Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call
 `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner.
 NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner,
 thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

@dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
 Can only be called by the current owner.

@dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
 Internal function without access restriction.

@dev Provides information about the current execution context, including the
 sender of the transaction and its data. While these are generally available
 via msg.sender and msg.data, they should not be accessed in such a direct
 manner, since when dealing with meta-transactions the account sending and
 paying for execution may not be the actual sender (as far as an application
 is concerned).
 This contract is only required for intermediate, library-like contracts.
@notice The DID hash associated with this account
@notice Whether this account has been initialized
@notice Allow the account to receive ETH
@notice Mapping from DID hash to deployed Smart Account address
@notice Total accounts created

@title IGroth16Verifier
 @notice Interface for the auto-generated Groth16 verifier from snarkjs
@notice The admin (university) who manages elections and enrollment commitments
@notice The on-chain Groth16 verifier contract (auto-generated by snarkjs)
@notice The current election identifier
@notice Whether an enrollment commitment is registered (set by admin during enrollment)
@notice Whether a nullifier hash has been used (prevents double registration)
@notice Whether a DID is marked as eligible for the current election
@notice Total number of eligible voters registered for the current election
@param _verifier Address of the deployed Groth16 verifier contract

@notice Start a new election. Resets eligibility state.
 @param _electionId Unique identifier for the election

@notice Revoke an enrollment commitment (e.g., student expelled)
 @param _commitment The commitment to revoke

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256[2] memory,uint256[2] memory[2] memory,uint256[2] memory,uint256[3] memory) view external returns (bool)

documentation.text: @notice The admin (university election committee)
@notice Reference to the VoterEligibility contract
@notice The election identifier this contract governs

@notice Re-entrancy guard

documentation.text: @notice End the election manually (admin override)
@notice Minimal interface for the ERC-4337 EntryPoint
@notice Address of the Voting contract — only operations targeting this are sponsored
@notice Total gas sponsored (for metrics / thesis evaluation)

@param _entryPoint Address of the ERC-4337 EntryPoint singleton
 @param _votingContract Address of the Voting contract to sponsor
@notice Deposit ETH to the EntryPoint to fund gas sponsorship

@notice Update the voting contract address
 @param _votingContract New voting contract address

@notice Check the Paymaster's balance at the EntryPoint
 @return The balance available for sponsorship
@notice Allow the contract to receive ETH

references.","kind":"dev","methods":{"addEnrollmentCommitments(bytes32[])":{"details":"The commitment is Poseidon(matricNumber, departmentId, enrollmentSecret)","params":{"_commitments":"Array of Thesis Project","details":"This contract:   - References VoterEligibility to confirm voter eligibility before accepting votes.   - Enforces the one-vote-per-DID rule: once a DID has voted, any subsequent     attempt is cryptographically rejected.   - Provides a public self-tallying function that anyone can call to verify results.   - Implements re-entrancy guards and access control as per Kushwaha et al. (2022).","kind":"dev","methods":{"addCandidate(uint256,string,string)":{"params":{"_candidateId":"Unique candidate identifier","_name":"Candidate's name","_party":"Candidate's party or affiliation"}},"castVote(bytes32,uint256)":{"details":"This function:   1. Checks the DID is eligible (via VoterEligibility contract)   2. Enforces one-vote-per-DID   3. Records the vote   4. Uses re-entrancy guard In the ERC-4337 flow, this is called via the EntryPoint contract on behalf of the student's Smart Account, with gas sponsored by the Paymaster.","params":{"_candidateId":"ID of the candidate to vote for","_didHash":"Hash of the voter's Decentralised Identifier"}},"constructor":{"params":{"_eligibilityContract":"Address of the deployed VoterEligibility contract"}},"getCandidate(uint256)":{"params":{"_candidateId":"ID of the candidate"},"returns":{"name":"The candidate's name","party":"The candidate's party","voteCount":"The number of votes received"}},"getResults()":{"returns":{"ids":"Array of candidate IDs","names":"Array of candidate names","parties":"Array of candidate parties","voteCounts":"Array of vote counts"}},"getWinner()":{"returns":{"winnerId":"The ID of the candidate with the most votes","winnerName":"The name of the winning candidate","winnerVotes":"The vote count of the winner"}},"hasVoterVoted(bytes32)":{"params":{"_didHash":"Hash of the DID to check"},"returns":{"_0":"True if the DID has already cast a vote"}},"initializeElection(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_electionId":"Unique election identifier (must match VoterEligibility)","_endTime":"Unix timestamp when voting closes","_startTime":"Unix timestamp when voting opens"}}},"title":"Voting","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addCandidate(uint256,string,string)":{"notice":"Add a candidate to the
